title: REPLACE causes segfault in table with generated column and foreign key
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT, score FLOAT, FOREIGN KEY(score) REFERENCES t1(age));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, value INT, generated_value INT AS (value * 2) STORED);
INSERT INTO t1 (name, age, score) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 90.5), ('Bob', 25, 85.0);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, age, score) VALUES (1, 'Charlie', NULL, 95.0), (2, 'David', 28, NULL);
key_bug_features: REPLACE with foreign key and generated column causes segfault
